Idioma.MSG_Primero_debe_seleccionar_un_centro_f: First it should select a functional center
Idioma.MSG_Error_tambien_debe_seleccionar_la_fe: Error, should also select the date to
Error, should also select the date since
Idioma.MSG_Error_la_fecha_de_inicio_no_debe_ser: Error, the date of start should not be greater that the final date
Idioma.AYUDA_En_este_reporte_se_muestra_la_tota: In this report the totalización of the hours is shown authorized or not of each Official grouped by Functional Center to which belong.
